Name: Billy's Business Card
Desc: Obtained by unlocking Billy's Mindscape Cinema "Teachings of the Starlight Knights"
Desc2:
A card with a high passing score printed on it.
The design of this card is clearly modeled after the official cards used by the Starlight Knights. Even the official certification mark is printed on it. It's evident that the Cunning Hares are big fans of the Starlight Knights.
